title: The Battle Resumes
description: On pages 16–18, the battle resumes as the giants’ proud battle becomes the center of the island as the Straw Hats learn what Elbaf honor means.
scene: The Battle Resumes. The giants’ proud battle becomes the center of the island as the Straw Hats learn what Elbaf honor means. The scene focuses on the immediate character conflict rather than background exposition.

dialogue.speaker: Dorry
dialogue.text: She blew up that Chikuwa mister so I hate her!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Well, I don't dislike bold men...

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Let us meet again soon if you survive.

dialogue.speaker: Vivi
dialogue.text: That woman...! I don't have the faintest idea what she's really planning!

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: Then it's a waste of time and effort to think about it.

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: We've got an incomp- rehensible person like her onboard too, you know.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Hey! Explain the situation to us!

dialogue.speaker: Vivi
dialogue.text: Will miss Wednesday be joining our crew?

dialogue.speaker: Dorry
dialogue.text: I said explain what's going on already!

dialogue.speaker: Dorry
dialogue.text: Whoa! We have an Ostrich on our ship!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Are you really alright with me riding on your ship...? ?

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: I may be just putting all of you into danger...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: It's already your fault that they found out about us and how we look like!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: If you didn't want to trouble us, then you should've done so to begin with!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: It's morning! Sanji! Time for break- fast!

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: Now then... since the sun is up,

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: Hello? Anybody listening? Could really use an explanation over here!

dialogue.speaker: Vivi
dialogue.text: Miss Wednesday! Might you be acquainted with that gorgeous lady just now ()?

summary: This part advances the chapter by focusing on the battle resumes. It keeps the main tension clear while preserving the dialogue that drives the scene.
